mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, introduction, price, quantity, image, createtime) VALUES (#{name}, #{introduction}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{image}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, introduction = #{introduction}, price = #{price}, quantity = #{quantity}, image = #{image}, createtime = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
